words.example: I play football every Saturday. - Je joue au football chaque samedi.
My favorite team won the basketball game. - Mon équipe préférée a gagné le match de basketball.
She plays tennis at the club. - Elle joue au tennis au club.
We want to win the championship. - Nous voulons gagner le championnat.
Don't be sad if you lose. - Ne sois pas triste si tu perds.
What's the final score? - Quel est le score final?
